Concept: Recycle Waste

Creator

Description


Usage List:

  • Appears as Recycle Waste in Diagram Recover Materials/Devices in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Recycle Waste in Diagram Recycle in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Recycle Waste in Diagram Treat Batteries at End-of-Life in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
